examples: From the outside, its stolid grayness is more Soviet than Swiss.
It means something like a kind of dulled grayness or ordinariness of life.
Everything seemed to wash together in a kind of bland, sickening grayness, and my knees buckled.
As my hair grew out, I saw how barbering it in the old days had hidden its increasing grayness.
The Love Barge, grayness and sameness for everyone.
